lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day. What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Farmer Fromund
lines.text: I'm tending to these farming patches. They need a little more work before I can plant anything.

lines.speaker: Farmer Fromund
lines.text: The centre patch is full of weeds, and as soon as I clear them they grow back. The south patch is always far too dry. And the soil in the north patch is terrible; it needs a good dose of compost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how the kingdom approves of me?

sections.title: Right-click Check-Approval before completing Royal Trouble

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how the kingdom approves of me?

lines.speaker: Farmer Fromund
lines.text: Kingdom? Etceteria is ruled by a Queen and we don't approve of you.

sections.title: Attempting to rake the weeds, watering the plants, or applying compost to one of his patches with 100% approval

lines.speaker: Farmer Fromund
lines.text: Don't trouble yourself further, Your Highness, you've already done so much!

sections.title: Attempting to rake the weeds, watering the plants, or applying compost to one of his patches before completing Royal Trouble

lines.speaker: Farmer Fromund
lines.text: Hey! This is the Queen's farm. You'll need her approval to make use of it.

lines.speaker: Farmer Fromund
lines.text: The storerooms are full, your Highness. You should talk to Advisor Ghrim to collect what we've gathered for you.
